Transitionalprovisions FIRST SCHEDULE SECOND SCHEDULE Compulsory Standards [No. 3 of 2017 73 GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA ACT No. 3 of 2017 DateofAssent:12thApril,2017 AnAct to provide forthe establishment of the Zambia Com- pulsory StandardsAgency and provide for its powers and functions;providefortheadministrationandmaintenance of compulsory standards for the purpose of public safety and health, consumer protection and environmental pro- tection; and provide for matters connected with, or inci- dental to, the foregoing.
